result.executive_summary: Invoice E9932206339 for OmniRetail’s July 2026 ARC monthly floor is valid. The contract authorizes an ARC model with a $840,000 annual recurring commitment billed at a $70,000 monthly floor. The invoice bills $70,000 for July 2026, uses Morgan Hale as the attention line, and the ARC ledger supports a $70,000 monthly floor approved by Morgan Hale. Payment reconciliation is also clean: $70,000 was received and applied, with $0 open balance.

validation_report.summary: The invoice correctly bills the July 2026 ARC monthly floor. Under the ARC rule set and contract, billing is supported when invoice amounts match same-period, same-customer consumption/commitment evidence and contract pricing. The contract allows the $70,000 monthly floor, and the July ARC ledger supports the exact $70,000 floor. The ledger-only actual platform consumption of $72,800 and unused expansion support were not separately billed, which is appropriate based on the evidence.

findings.description: Contract states Annual Recurring Commitment is $840,000 billed at a $70,000 monthly floor; invoice bills $70,000 for Digital Run ARC monthly floor, July 2026.
ARC ledger lists Monthly ARC floor, quantity 1, unit price 70000, amount 70000, approved by Morgan Hale.
Ledger shows actual platform run consumption of $72,800 marked 'Ledger only' and 'Tracked against ARC'; the invoice did not bill this as an additional line.
findings.expected_value: No separate billing unless approved as expansion/usage above floor

payment_summary.reasoning: Payment record shows invoice total $70,000.00, cash received $70,000.00, cash applied $70,000.00, pending payment/cash issue $0.00, open invoice balance $0.00, and unapplied cash/credit hold $0.00. Payment OMNI-ACH-260825-01 dated 25-Aug-2026 was fully applied.

guardrail_notes: Invoice/payment contract ID C-SVC-ARC-001 differs from agreement Contract No. SVC-ARC-2026-001; however, customer, billing model, amount, period, and supporting ledger align.
Invoice references Annexure 2, which was not visible in the preview packet.
Payment status confirms collection only; invoice validity was assessed separately from payment.
next_actions: Retain ARC ledger with the invoice support package.
Optionally document mapping between Contract No. SVC-ARC-2026-001 and Contract ID C-SVC-ARC-001 for audit traceability.
